blockingIssues.description: `src/cli_modes.rs`: `verify_room_case` may classify missing expected components as `ScopeMismatch` when the component exists elsewhere in the room (stale panels non-empty), potentially hiding real expectation mismatches.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: In room-verify-worker, document Rust `cargo test <filter>` pitfalls and recommend exact invocations to ensure intended tests actually run.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review verify-core-readonly-runner: worker ran `cargo test room_verify_tests --quiet` but it did not execute the new unit tests (per review sharedStateObservations).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align feature skill assignment: prefer room-verify-worker for verify-core/CLI validation features instead of backend-worker when the work is primarily room CLI + validation gate.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review stabilize-verify-core-validator-gate: feature skillName=backend-worker but transcript consulted room-verify-worker; suggests specialization mismatch.
